name: sommify
documentation:
```
python -m build
```

```
python -m twine upload dist/sommify-0.5.{}*
```

functions.name: sommify.prompts.extract_cooking_methods
documentation: Extracts cooking methods from text. Returns a list of cooking methods. If no cooking methods are found, returns an empty list.

functions.name: sommify.prompts.extract_ingredients
documentation: Extracts ingredients from text. Returns a list of ingredients. If no ingredients are found, returns an empty list.

functions.name: sommify.prompts.extract_cuisine
documentation: Extracts cuisine from text. Returns a list of cuisines. If no cuisine is found, returns an empty list.

functions.name: sommify.prompts.extract_mentions_naive
documentation:
Given a prompt, extract mentions of countries (iso), regions, subregions, and grapes.
Naive approach, fuzzy string matching.

functions.name: sommify.prompts.country_entity_to_iso
documentation: Given a country entity, return the iso code.

functions.name: sommify.prompts.region_entity_to_closest
documentation: Given a region entity, return the closest match.

methods.name: sommify.pyregion.ExistingRegions.find_closest_geo
documentation:
Find geographically closest region to name in subset. Ordering of closeness is:
0. regions that are children of name
1. regions that are siblings of name (same parent)
2. regions that are cousins of name (same grandparent)
...
N. same country

methods.name: sommify.recipes.reader.TagReader.generate_tag_embedding
documentation: def generate_ing_embedding(self, ing):
return self.ing_model.wv[ing] if ing in self.ing_model.wv else None
